# Deploy to CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md

## Quick Copy-Paste

### CLAUDE.md (Claude Code)
```markdown
## Wiki Maintenance
See karpathy-wiki-protocol/WIKI_PROTOCOL.md for rules.
Compress rules in §12 (~250 tokens).
```

### AGENTS.md
```markdown
## Wiki Rules
See https://github.com/Alirezajalilii/karpathy-wiki-protocol
```

## What This Protocol Does
- Compiles your raw docs into a searchable wiki
- Prevents context overflow from re-reading all docs
- Gives agents a maintained knowledge layer to query
- Catches every missed wiki update with a verification gate

## Status
✅ Production-tested | 22 domains | 139 pages | 425 audited gaps
